nodes.name: Example Category
nodes.summary: A neutral parent category for fixture topics.
scope_notes: Use this category only for workflow fixtures and examples.

nodes.name: Example Topic
nodes.summary: A neutral topic used to test candidate bundles, support maps, review gates, and publication.
scope_notes: Do not treat fixture records as public knowledge about a real domain.
Keep claims obviously synthetic and bounded to workflow validation.

nodes.name: Second Example Topic
nodes.summary: A second neutral topic so planning queues can distinguish covered and uncovered topics.
scope_notes: Use as an uncovered queue example.
